title: Point prevalence survey on HCAI, AMU and AMS in England 2023: resources
body: "Background  In 2023 the UK Health Security Agency carried out a national point prevalence survey (PPS) on healthcare-associated infections (HCAI), antimicrobial use (AMU) and antimicrobial stewardship (AMS).  This page brings together resources relating to the survey.   The survey report and annexe can be found at Point prevalence survey on HCAI, AMU and AMS in England: 2023 report.   Resources             Protocol    PDF, 2.56 MB, 46 pages                  Codebook    PDF, 938 KB, 76 pages     This file may not be suitable for users of assistive technology.    Request an accessible format.    If you use assistive technology (such as a screen reader) and need a version of this document in a more accessible format, please email publications@ukhsa.gov.uk. Please tell us what format you need. It will help us if you say what assistive technology you use.                 Slidedeck    PDF, 269 KB, 12 pages     This file may not be suitable for users of assistive technology.    Request an accessible format.    If you use assistive technology (such as a screen reader) and need a version of this document in a more accessible format, please email publications@ukhsa.gov.uk. Please tell us what format you need. It will help us if you say what assistive technology you use.                 Forms    PDF, 250 KB, 9 pages     This file may not be suitable for users of assistive technology.    Request an accessible format.    If you use assistive technology (such as a screen reader) and need a version of this document in a more accessible format, please email publications@ukhsa.gov.uk. Please tell us what format you need. It will help us if you say what assistive technology you use.      Training webinars  Webinars were created to help with completing the survey. These can still be accessed via the National Archives.  Contact  For any enquiries, contact HCAI_PPS@ukhsa.gov.uk  "
